note: Synthetic validation is stored separately from event-time replay evidence and must not be visible to generation or ranking steps.

rows.label: partial
rows.expected_observable: The stock underperforms a peer basket after the event.
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: AURORA continued to underperform commerce software peers, but estimate revisions were not yet broad enough for a full validation label.

rows.label: validated
rows.expected_observable: Analysts reduce forward revenue or gross merchandise volume estimates within 30 days.
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: forward demand slowdown became the validated narrative as estimate cuts and follow-up commentary centered on merchant expansion and retention.

rows.label: pending
rows.expected_observable: Future company commentary focuses on merchant retention, sales-cycle length, or attach rates.
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: left pending to show that not every validation window should be force-labeled.
